calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-05-2018 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Sunlan-020105, Llc,'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption.
Off Calendar May-23-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Vivian Leung Lerche, Tel. 1-415-680-5731, Specially appearing for the Plaintiff;
Naoufel Nacer, Tel. No. 1-415-259-4822, Defendant appearing in pro per.

RULING - The matter was not argued. Judgment debtor Naoufel Nacer's claim of exemption is granted in full. The remaining money held by the Sheriff shall be returned to Mr. Nacer.
Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/hk

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment, If Entered: And Quash Service Of Summons (Ccp 418.10)
Off Calendar May-23-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Vivian Leung Lerche, Tel. 1-415-680-5731, Specially appearing for the Plaintiff;
Naoufel Nacer, Tel. No. 1-415-259-4822, Defendant appearing in pro per.

Ruling - The matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Naoufel Nacer's motion to set aside default and default judgment is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. The default and default judgment entered against Naoufel Nacer on June 11, 2009 are set aside. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge; Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/hk

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Apr-18-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Roger E. Jackson, Esq. of the Law Offices of Roger E. Jackson, T:707.318.2994, specially appearing for plaintiff;
Naoufel Nacer, T:415.259.4820, defendant/claimant appearing on his own behalf.

RULING: Hearing held. Mr. Nacer was sworn and examined by the Court and by plaintiff's counsel. After hearing, the Court ruled on PLAINTIFF SUNLAN-020105, LLC's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION of Naoufel Nacer as follows:

Nauofel Nacer's Claim Of Exemption is GRANTED IN PART. The Levying Officer is directed to release $11,000.00 to Mr. Nauofel Nacer. The balance of the money shall remain with the Sheriff's Department pending the result of the hearing on defendant's MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT on the grounds that he has no knowledge of the judgment. The motion will be heard on May 23, 2018 at 9:30am in Dept. 302. Defendant shall file the motion on 5/07/18; any opposition is due on 5/15/18.

The Court will prepare and serve the order on all parties.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, email: cjordan@sftc.org.
